goal: Build a TRUE runtime-vision sorter using setup_pick_place_with_vision: 2 cubes (red + blue) on conveyor + camera. Vision classification + controller install in ONE tool call. Cubes routed to matching bins via vision-derived semantic labels at install time.
thoughts:
Six runtime-vision specifics for CP-47 (extends CP-33 — vision integrated INTO controller install):
1) NO pre-set semantic labels on cubes. Cubes only have visual color materials; semantic class set DYNAMICALLY by vision-gate during install.
2) setup_pick_place_with_vision composite tool: 1 call = vision classify + label + install controller.
3) Camera at [0, 1.5, 1.5] looking at [0, 0, 0.8] — verified working from CP-33.
4) destination_map={'red': RedBin, 'blue': BlueBin} — class names match what Gemini returns after suffix-stripping ('red cube' → 'red').
5) 1 Gemini API call per canonical instantiation (per setup_pick_place_with_vision). Cost-aware.
6) Production realization of #15 Vision Quality Gate research scenario — full pipeline working end-to-end (CP-33 was vision-gate + manual hardcoded routing; CP-47 is vision-derived).
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Cubes — visual color only, NO semantic labels
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.6, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cube_red", "/World/Cube_blue"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", material_name="rubber")
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/RedBin",  position=[-0.4, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/RedBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", position=[ 0.4, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

# Camera + viewport (verified placement from CP-33)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Composite vision-driven setup — 1 Gemini API call per install
setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    cube_paths=["/World/Cube_red", "/World/Cube_blue"],
    class_labels=["red cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path="/World/Cam",
    destination_map={"red": "/World/RedBin", "blue": "/World/BlueBin"},
    destination_path="/World/RedBin",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    drop_target=[-0.4, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/RedBin", "/World/BlueBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-47 is the FULL real-runtime-vision sorter — vision classification + dynamic semantic labels + controller install all in one tool call (setup_pick_place_with_vision). No pre-tagged cubes. CP-33 used hardcoded color_routing matching what vision-gate produces; CP-47 derives routing FROM vision at install time.
failure_modes: Vision returns 0 detections → tool returns error. Camera placement matters; use verified setup [0, 1.5, 1.5]→[0, 0, 0.8].
Class label mismatch — destination_map keys must match vision output minus ' cube' suffix ('red cube' → 'red'). Tool handles suffix-stripping internally.
1 Gemini API call per canonical run — be aware of cost.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths — Cube_red delivered to RedBin)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Cubes — visual color only, NO semantic labels
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path="/World/Materials/Red")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{red_destination.path}},  position={{red_destination.position}}, size={{red_destination.size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{red_destination.path}}, material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
create_bin(prim_path={{blue_destination.path}}, position={{blue_destination.position}}, size={{blue_destination.size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{blue_destination.path}}, material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")

# Camera + viewport (verified placement from CP-33)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# Composite vision-driven setup — 1 Gemini API call per install
setup_pick_place_with_vision(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    cube_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    class_labels=["red cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path="/World/Cam",
    destination_map={"red": {{red_destination.path}}, "blue": {{blue_destination.path}}},
    destination_path={{red_destination.path}},
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    drop_target=[-0.4, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{red_destination.path}}, {{blue_destination.path}}],
)
